$orderId..validate: newData.hasChildren(['customerName','phone','address','items','status','createdAt']) && newData.child('customerName').isString() && newData.child('phone').isString() && newData.child('address').isString() && (newData.child('status').val() === 'pending' || newData.child('status').val() === 'processing' || newData.child('status').val() === 'shipped' || newData.child('status').val() === 'delivered' || newData.child('status').val() === 'cancelled')

$reviewId..validate: newData.hasChildren(['name','comment','rating','createdAt']) && newData.child('rating').isNumber() && newData.child('rating').val() >= 1 && newData.child('rating').val() <= 5 && newData.child('name').isString() && newData.child('name').val().length > 0 && newData.child('name').val().length <= 60 && newData.child('comment').isString() && newData.child('comment').val().length > 0 && newData.child('comment').val().length <= 500

newData.hasChildren(['name','comment','rating','productId','createdAt']) && newData.child('rating').isNumber() && newData.child('rating').val() >= 1 && newData.child('rating').val() <= 5 && newData.child('name').isString() && newData.child('name').val().length > 0 && newData.child('name').val().length <= 60 && newData.child('comment').isString() && newData.child('comment').val().length > 0 && newData.child('comment').val().length <= 500
